products.heroTitle: Start Strong. Grow As You Go.
products.heroDescription: Every agency gets a powerful base package — then adds the modules that match their mission. No bloat. No paying for what you don't use.
products.heroSecondaryLink: Talk to our team about your agency
products.baseDescription: Everything your agency needs to run — included from day one.
products.addonsDescription: Each module is purpose-built for a specific operational area. Add one, add all — your platform grows with your agency.

basePackageFeatures: Training records, ISO/NFPA compliance mapping, and career development
Automated renewal alerts, digital cert storage, and compliance dashboards
Drag-and-drop shift scheduling with overtime, callback, and union rules
Daily inspection checklists, maintenance scheduling, and out-of-service tracking
Station supply tracking, equipment logs, and automated reorder alerts
NFIRS & NERIS-compliant reporting with CAD integration and offline capture
